question.label: Decision clarity
question.name: Which decision do you wish were made sooner?
question.description: Finds ambiguity or waiting that is slowing execution and creating uncertainty.

answer: releasing a month ago would have been better, or releasing after bob it back

assessment.note: He said the release should have happened earlier or after Bob returned, signaling a clearer sequencing preference but not additional ownership or energy.

new_queue.name: How are you actually recovering between workdays?

new_queue.name: What part of your work has started to feel like maintenance?
